headline: 8 WTGXX token contracts across 7 chains catalogued; OpenZeppelin audit and platform documentation reviewed

findings.text: WisdomTree WTGXX token contract addresses identified via official press releases and protocol documentation across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism, Plume, and Stellar blockchains.

WisdomTree Connect platform documentation confirmed at https://www.wisdomtreeconnect.com/ with developer docs reference pointing to https://docs.wisdomtreeconnect.com/. No dedicated deployed contracts page found; addresses sourced from fund factsheet and press releases.

OpenZeppelin security audit conducted in 2025 covering whitelist compliance oracle, ERC-721 soulbound tokens, and beacon proxy architecture used in the protocol. Repository: wisdomtreeam/whitelist-contexts at commit 4476078.
No GitHub repository URL found in pinned protocol inputs or discoverable via public sources. OpenZeppelin audit references wisdomtreeam/whitelist-contexts repository on Bitbucket, not GitHub.
WTGXX token deployed on all pinned chains (Ethereum, Stellar) plus 5 additional chains (Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism, Plume). Token uses ERC-20 standard on EVM chains; native asset on Stellar.
No factory contracts identified. Protocol deploys discrete token contracts per chain rather than child contracts from a factory pattern.

All identified contracts classified as token role. Transfer agent (WisdomTree Transfers, Inc.) maintains official share ownership records. Whitelist system and soulbound NFTs enable access control via ERC-721 compliance oracle.

All addresses traceable to official sources: press releases, fund factsheets, and protocol documentation. Additional chains (Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism, Plume) disclosed in April 2025 expansion announcement.

rationale.verdict: Catalogued 8 WTGXX token contracts across 7 blockchains. Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism, and Plume are EVM-compatible; Stellar is native. OpenZeppelin audit of whitelist and access control infrastructure completed March 2025. Platform documentation and governance structure partially documented; some organizational details remain undiscovered (GitHub repo, governance token, formal audit of token contracts beyond whitelist oracle).

evidence.shows: WisdomTree Connect press release announcing WTGXX launch with Ethereum contract address 0x1feCF3d9d4Fee7f2c02917A66028a48C6706c179
Corroborating press release on Business Wire confirming Ethereum WTGXX address and platform launch September 2024

WisdomTree Connect official website describing platform, supported chains (Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Plume, Solana, Stellar), and institutional-only access model with soulbound NFT whitelist
April 2025 expansion announcement confirming multi-chain deployment of WTGXX and 12 other tokenized funds across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, and Optimism
CoinDesk reporting April 2025 expansion; confirms platform previously limited to Ethereum, now supports Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism

OpenZeppelin security audit March 2025 of wisdomtreeam/whitelist-contexts repository at commit 4476078. Audited whitelist compliance oracle, ERC-721 soulbound token, beacon proxy pattern, and access control for compliance-gated token transfers
WTGXX fund FAQs confirming support for Ethereum, Stellar, Avalanche, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, and Plume. T+0 settlement on U.S. trading days. $1 NAV minimum investment.

Platform details: 13 SEC-registered tokenized funds; institutional access via KYC/AML verified wallets; transfers enabled via soulbound NFT tags; PYUSD/USDC/USD settlement; 24/7 T+0 settlement for WTGXX via registered broker-dealer
RWA.xyz WTGXX tracker: $854.8M total value, 860 holders, 3.48% 7D APY, 0.25% management fee, monthly dividend distribution

unknowns: D2: No dedicated deployed-contracts documentation page found at /deployments, /addresses, or similar canonical path
D4: GitHub repository URL not recorded in pinned protocol context; OpenZeppelin audit cites Bitbucket (wisdomtreeam/whitelist-contexts) — may not be primary source repo for all protocol contracts
D6: Factory contract enumeration not performed; no factory-based architecture identified in available docs

D8: No on-chain read API fetches performed; all addresses from off-chain sources (press releases, factsheets). Block-explorer name-tag searches not performed to discover additional contracts or verify address tags.

protocol_metadata.about: WisdomTree Connect is an institutional platform for tokenized real-world assets (RWA), launched September 2024. The primary product is WTGXX, the WisdomTree Treasury Money Market Digital Fund—a money market fund offering short-term U.S. government securities exposure with a stable $1.00 NAV, monthly dividend distributions (0.25% fee), and instant T+0 settlement 24/7. Tokens are deployed natively on 7 blockchains (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism, Plume, Stellar) and accessible only to verified institutional investors via soulbound ERC-721 compliance NFTs, enabling peer-to-peer transfers between whitelisted wallets.
